feature.name: Implement CSS property font-language-override
feature.creator: sejalanand@microsoft.com
feature.summary:
This feature introduces support for the font-language-override CSS property in Chromium. The property allows developers to override the system language used for OpenType glyph substitution by specifying a four-character language tag directly in CSS.

This enables fine-grained typographic control, particularly useful for multilingual content or fonts with language-specific glyph variants.

ChromeStatus record (created 2025-09-16 by sejalanand@microsoft.com). This feature introduces support for the font-language-override CSS property in Chromium. The property allows developers to override the system language used for OpenType glyph substitution by specifying a four-character language tag directly in CSS.

This enables fine-grained typographic control, particularly useful for multilingual content or fonts with language-specific glyph variants. Category: Miscellaneous. Blink component: Blink>Fonts. Stars: 74.
